events.summary: Keybanc upgraded Federal Signal (FSS), a mid-cap stock, from Sector Weight to Overweight and set price target at $130.
International Seaways (INSW) upgraded to Zacks Rank #1 Strong Buy driven by estimate revisions, 42.38% projected EPS growth, and strong momentum.
